{"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-346", "name": "Origin Validation Error"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-441", "name": "Unintended Proxy or Intermediary ('Confused Deputy')"}], "description": "### Impact

When a user-configured proxy on `webpack-dev-server` has a broad context (e.g. `/`) and `ws: true`, it also intercepts the dev server's own HMR WebSocket and forwards it to the proxy target. This leaks the browser's cookies and `Origin` header to the backend, bypasses the dev server's Host/Origin validation, and corrupts the HMR socket (both HMR and the proxy end up writing to the same socket).

### Patches

Fixed in `webpack-dev-server` 5.2.5.

### Workarounds

Scope user-defined proxy `context` to specific paths instead of `/`, or omit `ws: true` from the proxy entry when WebSocket forwarding is not required.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00163, "percentile": 0.05801}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T18:13:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9595"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-15T16:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:13:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/security/advisories/GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9595", "https://github.com/facebook/create-react-app/pull/7444", "https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/pull/4316", "https://github.com/vuejs/vue-cli/commit/72ba7505aff2a8314e82aa5082379a77504a1fcb", "https://cna.openjsf.org/security-advisories.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/webpack/webpack-dev-server/security-advisories/GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server", "summary": "webpack-dev-server vulnerable to HMR WebSocket interception via permissive user proxies", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T18:13:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mx8g-39q3-5c79", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.2.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "webpack-dev-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.2.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: webpack-dev-server vulnerable to HMR WebSocket interception via permissive user proxies
